title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Wheezing
description: Ephedra sinica tinctures contains ephedrine and pseudoephedrine as its bioactive constituents. These compounds are known for their bronchodilatory properties, which help to widen airways and improve breathing. Ephedrine and pseudoephedrine also have anti-inflammatory properties, reducing swelling in the airways and making it easier to breathe. The expectorant properties of Ephedra sinica tinctures help to thin and clear mucus from the airways, further relieving wheezing symptoms. By pr...
